message:
fix(telemetry): unset GT_RUN and GT_SESSION in empty-context tests (gt-x5sa)

TestRunIDFromCtx_Empty and TestBuildGTResourceAttrs_Empty fail when
GT_RUN/GT_SESSION are set in the environment (e.g. inside a polecat
session). Use t.Setenv to clear these vars before asserting empty results.

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,8 @@ func TestBuildGTResourceAttrs_Empty(t *testing.T) {
 	t.Setenv("BD_ACTOR", "")
 	t.Setenv("GT_POLECAT", "")
 	t.Setenv("GT_CREW", "")
+	t.Setenv("GT_SESSION", "")
+	t.Setenv("GT_RUN", "")
 	t.Setenv("GT_WORK_RIG", "")
 	t.Setenv("GT_WORK_BEAD", "")
 	t.Setenv("GT_WORK_MOL", "")
